study_title: Apis mellifera prepual fat body lncRNA-seq
lab: College of Animal Science (College of Bee Science)

study_title: The absence of pollen in the diet of worker honeybees triggers premature aging
exp_title: mRNA library from Pollen-Free Diet Replicate 3

sample_description: A pool of RNA extracted from 4 abdominal carcasses containing fat body tissue of 7-day-old adult bee workers fed on pollen-free diet
